title: Power Golf
action_mood_cue: leaning into motion under bright arena light
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Sports game.

A single athlete silhouette in a stadium or competition ground with lights, field markers, and focused event framing, leaning into motion under bright arena light.

Game metadata:
- Title: Power Golf
- Platform: TurboGrafx-16
- Release year: 1989
- Secondary genre signal: Competition

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- bright arcade key art, punchy motion, crisp light, poster-like composition
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- competitive, clean, focused

Composition:
- one subject slightly left of center, with a clean silhouette and a world behind it that explains the genre immediately
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no copyrighted costume replication, no original enemy designs, no game logo, no UI elements, no screenshot recreation, no exact box art composition, no branded symbols, no text, no abstract shapes, no decorative geometry, no empty background
legal_notes: Risk level low; use generic subject archetypes, readable environments, and platform-coded style only. Downgrade if likeness risk rises.
